name: api-talk
title: api-talk
description: Chat with OpenAI-compatible LLM APIs (OpenAI, relays, local).
author: IntelHeartPrime

commands.name: poe-talking-chat
commands.title: Chat with AI (OpenAI-Compatible)
commands.subtitle: api-talk
commands.description: Interactive chat interface with OpenAI-compatible APIs

commands.name: poe-talking-history
commands.title: Browse AI Conversations
commands.subtitle: api-talk
commands.description: Browse and manage your conversation history

commands.name: poe-test-connection
commands.title: Test API Connection
commands.subtitle: api-talk
commands.description: Test your OpenAI-compatible API connection and settings

preferences.name: apiKey
preferences.title: API Key
preferences.description: Your API key for an OpenAI-compatible endpoint

preferences.name: apiBaseUrl
preferences.title: API Base URL
preferences.description: OpenAI-compatible base URL (e.g., https://api.openai.com/v1 or https://api.jiekou.ai/openai)

preferences.name: refererUrl
preferences.title: Referer URL (Optional)
preferences.description: HTTP-Referer header (useful for some relay providers)

preferences.name: appTitle
preferences.title: App Title (Optional)
preferences.description: X-Title header (useful for some relay providers)

preferences.name: poeApiKey
preferences.title: Legacy API Key (migration)
preferences.description: Older releases stored the key under this id. If the main API Key reads empty but chat used to work, your key may still be here—we merge it automatically when the main field is empty.

preferences.name: botName
preferences.title: Legacy model / bot name (migration)
preferences.description: Older releases used this field for the model id. Used when Model is empty.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
